requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vs GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2与GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2與GB/T

summary.en: Cape Verde's Portuguese and IEC/European legacy points EV charging projects toward IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC charging, consistent with 230/400 V 50 Hz European practice. Type 2 / CCS2 connector conformity becomes a mandatory project requirement when written into an IGQPI-referenced standard, ARME or ELECTRA project condition, tender, site-owner requirement, or charge-point-operator specification. This is not an Americas J1772/CCS1 market assumption.
summary.zh: 佛得角具有葡语区及IEC/欧洲传统背景，电动汽车充电项目通常应面向交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，符合230/400 V 50 Hz欧洲实践。当IGQPI引用标准、ARME或ELECTRA项目条件、招标、场地方要求或充电点运营商规范写明Type 2 / CCS2时，接口符合性即成为项目强制要求。不得按美洲J1772/CCS1市场假设处理。
summary.zht: 維德角具有葡語區及IEC/歐洲傳統背景，電動汽車充電項目通常應面向交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，符合230/400 V 50 Hz歐洲實務。當IGQPI引用標準、ARME或ELECTRA項目條件、招標、場地方要求或充電點運營商規範寫明Type 2 / CCS2時，接口符合性即成為項目強制要求。不得按美洲J1772/CCS1市場假設處理。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / Combo 2 DC and AC/DC couplers
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 DC communication. These are not physically or electrically interchangeable with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure. GB/T AC couplers differ from Type 2 in gender, signaling, and contact arrangement; GB/T DC couplers differ from CCS2 geometry and communication architecture.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配合GB/T 27930直流通信。这些接口无法与IEC Type 2 / CCS2基础设施进行物理或电气互换。GB/T交流接口在接口性别、信号和触点排列上不同于Type 2；GB/T直流接口在几何形状和通信架构上不同于CCS2。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配合GB/T 27930直流通訊。這些接口無法與IEC Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施進行物理或電氣互換。GB/T交流接口在接口性別、信號和觸點排列上不同於Type 2；GB/T直流接口在幾何形狀和通訊架構上不同於CCS2。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Cape Verde Type 2 / CCS2 deployments. Conversion requires coupler and cable redesign, locking and temperature-rise evidence, control-pilot and proximity-pilot changes, CCS2 DC communication support, labels, spare parts, and test reports. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于佛得角Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要重新设计耦合器和电缆、提供锁止和温升证据、修改控制导引和接近导引、支持CCS2直流通信、更新标签、备件和测试报告。转接器不应被视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於維德角Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要重新設計耦合器和電纜、提供鎖止和溫升證據、修改控制導引和接近導引、支持CCS2直流通訊、更新標籤、備件和測試報告。轉接器不應被視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by project, tender, network operator, site owner, or adopted IEC/European specification; GB/T substitution is connector-incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Cape Verde as an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 direction unless a project specification states otherwise. GB/T 20234 hardware is connector-incompatible and needs redesign, not relabelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目规范另有说明，应将佛得角按IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向处理。GB/T 20234硬件接口不兼容，需要重新设计，而不是重新贴标。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目規範另有說明，應將維德角按IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向處理。GB/T 20234硬體接口不兼容，需要重新設計，而不是重新貼標。
